query: SELECT DISTINCT li.description, li.unitPrice FROM invoiceLineItems li WHERE li.invoiceId BETWEEN 60012 AND 60131 AND (UPPER(li.description) LIKE '%MILK%LACTANTIA%' OR UPPER(li.description) LIKE '%BEURRE NON SALÉ 82%NOUVELLE%' OR UPPER(li.description) LIKE '%BUTTER SALTED%') LIMIT 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3M4hPncfDS8MBAb.82b03a6e50f8 --database h46y7gAGiyBszkHNcCdSHx --execute SELECT DISTINCT li.description, li.unitPrice FROM invoiceLineItems li WHERE li.invoiceId BETWEEN 60012 AND 60131 AND (UPPER(li.description) LIKE '%MILK%LACTANTIA%' OR UPPER(li.description) LIKE '%BEURRE NON SALÉ 82%NOUVELLE%' OR UPPER(li.description) LIKE '%BUTTER SALTED%') LIMIT 10;
